notes: Relocated the 🎥 camera-save button. It used to sit in the top-right view toolbar (next to カメラリセット / アニメーション); it now lives in the scene-layer panel footer, immediately to the right of 読み込み / 書き出し. The footer is now a 3-column grid and the label was shortened to カメラ保存 / Save Cam so all three fit (verified: 87px cells, no overflow on a 285px panel). The button keeps id=btnSaveCamera and saveCameraLayer(), so phone-hide, tooltip mapping and i18n are unchanged; clicking it still creates a Camera folder + camera layer. Builds on v0.0.27.
